title: dianthus buergeri
intro: Dianthus buergeri, also known as the mountain pink or pink dianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Korea and China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Dianthus buergeri include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as skin conditions like acne and eczema. Dianthus buergeri is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although further studies are needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
